description_long: This lamp features a modern, geometric design with a sharply angled arm connecting a rectangular base to a wide, flat lamp head. The structure is primarily composed of a matte, light brown material, with a contrasting dark support element beneath the base and a small white connector at the joint. The lamp head is broad and flat, likely housing an integrated light source, and is positioned to cast light downward. The base is solid and rectangular, providing stability, while the angled arm gives the lamp a distinctive, architectural appearance. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. This lamp would suit contemporary urban environments such as offices, desks, or public reading areas.
description: A modern, angular lamp with a flat rectangular head, angled arm, and solid rectangular base in matte brown with minimalistic styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply angled arm, flat lamp head, and rectangular base with a visible dark support underneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the lamp head and arm, with the base appearing as a solid block.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the angled arm and the dark support structure beneath the base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad surfaces of both the lamp head and base, with the dark support most visible.
